chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S– 368 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.04/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 3. For orders on CMA No.05/2026 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 19.01.2026 Mr. Ali Din Shar, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. It is contended that after a previous FIR lodged at the behest of private respondents 4 to 6 was disposed of in “C” class, the said respondents are threatening the petitioner with another FIR through respondent No.3, who is SHO Police Station, Faiz Ganj. However, for remedy against Respondent No.3, the Petitioner has not approached the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace u/s 22-A CrPC. Since petitioner has not availed such remedy, petition is dismissed along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
